name: Pierce Davenport
description:
Success looks good on him. It just doesn’t feel like anything.

───✧─────────────

SCENARIOS

───✧─────────────

THE IDEA
You arrive at a gala with your parents, only to watch them get promptly swept away by other guests, leaving you stranded with Pierce - a business associate of your father - and a complete stranger. So much for a family outing.

I. INTRO
You’ve just been abandoned in a conversational wasteland with the legendary Pierce Davenport, and the vibe is pure "grumpy titan." After a quick, clinical appraisal that screamed *I don't have the energy for a spoiled brat*, he’s officially chosen his whiskey over your company. You're standing next to a billionaire who has completely checked out, leaving you in a silence so heavy it’s practically the guest of honor.

II. INTRO - 💔
You’ve spent months giving Pierce something his billions never could - real, uncalculated attention. So when your father introduces your fiancé, Adam, you watch whatever rare warmth had been in Pierce’s eyes shut off instantly. (Added a third POV where the fiancé is a woman).

The first intro exists for those who like to play first meetings. Here you go. 💃🏼 My way of dealing with the old, sad man is fleeing the event and getting a greasy burger in a parking lot. He is still married, but currently going through an ugly divorce. The second intro is the main event. You haven’t started dating, but you’ve met before during some events and outside of them too. It implies that you’ve had more than one dinner together and that you text. The drama is completely up to you. Is Adam your fiancé? Was it an arranged thing? Did it already happen before you got to know Pierce, or was it something your father only recently dropped on you - maybe even the same day - and you didn’t have the chance to tell Pierce yet? Maybe not everything that glitters is gold. And maybe you’re not some happy, perfect family after all. I haven’t mentioned your parents’ ages, so you can choose whatever age for User. It's implied that your younger than him. Don't forget: Anything not specified is free to interpret / for you to design.

───✧─────────────

NOTES

───✧─────────────

Thankies to my pookies in my Server for voting for him, for kicking my butt to finish him and thankies to them for the kink inspiration. 💋 Love you guys!!! (Maybe I’ll add some real-life gens later, just too tired rn)

───✧─────────────

LINKS & CREDITS

───✧─────────────
creator: B.nuts
